executable.title: Apply Slide Classifier
executable.description: Apply a trained slide classifier to a folder of slides. Reads TRIDENT embeddings from each item's meta.trident.features_h5, runs the model, and writes per-class probabilities to item metadata as _slideClassifierPrediction.

parameters.label: Input
parameters.description: Folder to predict and model to use

string.name: folder_id
string.label: Target Folder ID
string.description: Girder folder containing slides with TRIDENT embeddings to predict on.

string.name: model_path
string.label: Model Path
string.description: Container-internal filesystem path to model.pkl produced by Build Slide Classifier.

string.name: job_dir
string.label: Output Directory
string.description: Container-internal path where predictions.json will be written. Leave empty to skip file output.

parameters.label: Girder API URL and Key
parameters.description: Auto-injected by Slicer CLI Web; do not set manually.
